description: CompositionGreen T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron Flaunt the Indian rustic style of living with this cheeky blue t-shirt from tantra.
